upgrade.elementals.obsidianForm.descript: Dry out nearby lava, hardening it into solid obsidian.
upgrade.elementals.obsidianFormRadiusI.d: Harden a wider patch of lava.
Harden an even wider patch of lava.
upgrade.elementals.eruption.description: Strike the ground, erupting a burst of magma that burns and knocks back everything nearby.
upgrade.elementals.eruptionRadiusII.desc: Increases the eruption's radius even further.
upgrade.elementals.eruptionPowerI.descri: The eruption deals significantly more damage.
upgrade.elementals.lavaSurf.description: Toggle: while standing on lava, become immune to fire/lava damage and gain a burst of speed.
upgrade.elementals.lavaSurfSpeedI.descri: Surfing on lava is noticeably faster.
upgrade.elementals.moltenGrip.descriptio: Grab the nearest enemy in front of you with a tendril of magma and pull them in.
upgrade.elementals.moltenGripRangeII.des: Increases the grab range even further.
upgrade.elementals.moltenGripPowerI.desc: Molten Grip deals more damage on contact.
upgrade.elementals.obsidianPillar.descri: Gather nearby obsidian and hurl it upward into a spike, launching anything caught underneath. Only Lava benders can control obsidian this way.
upgrade.elementals.vineArc.description: Lash out with a curving arc of vines, striking everything caught along its sweep. A more visible, arcing version of Vine Whip.
upgrade.elementals.vineArcPowerI.descrip: Vine Arc deals significantly more damage.
upgrade.elementals.thornBarrage.descript: Fire a spread of thorns in front of you, damaging and poisoning everything caught in the volley.
upgrade.elementals.thornBarragePowerI.de: The thorns deal more damage and poison for longer.
upgrade.elementals.overgrowthSpikes.desc: Slam the ground, erupting a ring of root spikes that launch and damage everything nearby.
upgrade.elementals.overgrowthSpikesPower: Overgrowth Spikes deals significantly more damage.
upgrade.elementals.mudWall.description: Raises a wall of mud in front of you.
upgrade.elementals.mudWallHeightII.descr: The mud wall rises even higher.
upgrade.elementals.mudShell.description: Cover yourself in hardened mud, gaining Resistance for a short time.
upgrade.elementals.mudShellHardenedI.des: The shell hardens further, granting a stronger Resistance effect.
upgrade.elementals.quicksand.description: Turn the ground into a patch of quicksand, instantly trapping anyone caught in it in place. Hold Sneak to keep them stuck; the patch and the trapped effect vanish the moment you release Sneak.
upgrade.elementals.quicksandRadiusI.desc: Increase the size of the quicksand patch.
upgrade.elementals.quicksandRadiusII.des: Greatly increase the size of the quicksand patch.
upgrade.elementals.quicksandGripI.descri: Quicksand grips targets harder, slowing them more.
upgrade.elementals.mudSlide.description: Ride a wave of mud that drags you and nearby enemies forward.
upgrade.elementals.mudSurge.description: A quick surge of mud pulls you forward and upward, like a short dash.
upgrade.elementals.mudSurgePowerI.descri: Mud Surge pulls you forward and upward with much more force.
upgrade.elementals.mudBall.description: Launch a hardened ball of mud at range.
upgrade.elementals.mudBallBlindnessI.des: Mud ball briefly blinds the target on impact.
upgrade.elementals.mudMastery.descriptio: You have mastered every technique of Mud bending. Your Chi no longer drains from using Mud abilities.
upgrade.elementals.bendingMud.descriptio: Allows you to gain control of Mud, increase your focus on the most fluid aspects of the mud..
upgrade.elementals.crystalWall.descripti: Crystallize the ground in front of you into a wall of solid amethyst.
upgrade.elementals.crystalWallHeightII.d: The crystal wall rises even higher.
upgrade.elementals.crystalArmor.descript: Instantly crystallize a shell of amethyst over your skin, granting Resistance and temporary Absorption.
upgrade.elementals.crystalArmorHardenedI: The armor hardens further, granting a stronger Resistance effect and more Absorption.
upgrade.elementals.crystalPrison.descrip: Encase the nearest enemy in front of you in a cage of amethyst, locking their movement and slowing them for a fixed duration.
Increase the size of the crystal cage.
upgrade.elementals.crystalPrisonRadiusII: Greatly increase the size of the crystal cage.
upgrade.elementals.crystalPrisonGripI.de: Crystal Prison grips the target harder and lasts noticeably longer.
upgrade.elementals.crystalDash.descripti: Propel yourself forward in a crystal-fueled dash, shattering a trail of amethyst behind you and pushing anything in your path.
upgrade.elementals.crystalStep.descripti: Shatter into crystal shards and instantly reform a short distance ahead, blinking through small gaps.
upgrade.elementals.crystalSpike.descript: Target a point and erupt a cluster of amethyst spikes from the impact, damaging and launching everything nearby.
upgrade.elementals.crystalSpikePowerII.d: Crystal Spike deals heavy damage and erupts more spikes.
upgrade.elementals.crystalSpikeRadiusI.d: Increases the spike eruption's impact radius.
upgrade.elementals.crystalMastery.descri: You have mastered every technique of Crystal bending. Your Chi no longer drains from using Crystal abilities.
upgrade.elementals.bendingCrystal.descri: Allows you to gain control of crystal, crystallizing earth and stone into sharp, gleaming amethyst.
